framework.name: CFCS Supply Chain Security Guidance
framework.scope: Guidance for managing cybersecurity risks in the supply chain for Danish organizations
framework.structure_description: Guidance organized by supply chain security domains: vendor assessment, contract management, access management, monitoring, software supply chain, and contingency.

controls.title: Vendor risk assessment
controls.description: The organization must conduct a risk assessment of all vendors with access to the organization systems, data, or network.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal gennemfoere en risikovurdering af alle leverandoerer med adgang til organisationens systemer, data eller netvaerk.
controls.implementation_guidance: Klassificer leverandoerer efter risiko baseret pa dataadgang, systemadgang og leverandoerens kritikalitet for forretningen.

controls.title: Vendor due diligence
controls.description: Before contract signing, the organization must verify the vendor security level via certifications, audits, or security assessments.
controls.description_nl: Foer kontraktindgaelse skal organisationen verificere leverandoerens sikkerhedsniveau via certificeringer, audits eller sikkerhedsvurderinger.

controls.title: Vendor classification
controls.description: Vendors must be classified into risk levels based on which data and systems they have access to and their impact on the organization security.
controls.description_nl: Leverandoerer skal klassificeres i risikoniveauer baseret pa hvilke data og systemer de har adgang til og deres pavirkning pa organisationens sikkerhed.

controls.title: Security requirements in vendor agreements
controls.description: Contracts with vendors must contain specific security requirements including encryption, access control, logging, and incident reporting.
controls.description_nl: Kontrakter med leverandoerer skal indeholde specifikke sikkerhedskrav herunder kryptering, adgangsstyring, logning og incidentrapportering.
controls.implementation_guidance: Inkluder krav til ISO 27001-certificering eller tilsvarende. Definer krav til audit-adgang og exit-plan.

controls.title: Data processing agreement
controls.description: For vendors processing personal data on behalf of the organization, a data processing agreement must be entered into in accordance with GDPR Article 28.
controls.description_nl: For leverandoerer der behandler personoplysninger pa vegne af organisationen, skal der indgas en databehandleraftale i henhold til GDPR artikel 28.

controls.title: Management of sub-contractors
controls.description: The organization must have visibility into and approval rights over the vendor use of sub-contractors with access to the organization data.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal have indsigt i og godkendelsesret over leverandoerens brug af underleverandoerer med adgang til organisationens data.

controls.title: Vendor access management
controls.description: Vendor access to the organization systems must be specific, time-limited, and subject to the principle of least privilege.
controls.description_nl: Leverandoerens adgang til organisationens systemer skal vaere specifik, tidsbegraenset og underlagt mindste-privilegium-princippet.

controls.title: Vendor remote access
controls.description: Remote access for vendors must use dedicated, encrypted channels with session monitoring and logging of all activities.
controls.description_nl: Fjernadgang for leverandoerer skal ske via dedikerede, krypterede kanaler med sessionovervagning og logging af alle aktiviteter.

controls.title: Regular review of vendor access
controls.description: All vendor accounts and access rights must be reviewed at least semi-annually and removed immediately upon contract termination.
controls.description_nl: Alle leverandoerkonti og adgangsrettigheder skal gennemgas mindst halvaarligt og fjernes straks ved kontraktophoer.

controls.title: Ongoing monitoring of vendor security
controls.description: The organization must continuously monitor the vendor security level via regular audits, certification renewals, and news monitoring.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal loebende overvaage leverandoerens sikkerhedsniveau via regelmaessige audits, certificeringsfornyelser og nyhedsovervagning.

controls.title: Vendor security incidents
controls.description: Vendors must be obligated to report security incidents that affect the organization within an agreed timeframe.
controls.description_nl: Leverandoerer skal vaere forpligtet til at rapportere sikkerhedshaendelser der pavirker organisationen inden for en aftalt tidsramme.

controls.title: SLA monitoring for security
controls.description: Security-related SLA requirements for vendors must be monitored systematically with defined consequences for non-compliance.
controls.description_nl: Sikkerhedsrelaterede SLA-krav til leverandoerer skal overvaages systematisk med definerede konsekvenser ved manglende overholdelse.

controls.title: Verification of software integrity
controls.description: All software from vendors must be verified for integrity via digital signatures, checksums, or Software Bill of Materials (SBOM).
controls.description_nl: Al software fra leverandoerer skal verificeres for integritet via digitale signaturer, checksums eller Software Bill of Materials (SBOM).
controls.implementation_guidance: Krav SBOM for kritisk software. Verificer digitale signaturer foer installation.

controls.title: Vulnerability management in third-party software
controls.description: The organization must have processes for identifying and handling vulnerabilities in third-party software and open source components.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal have processer for at identificere og handtere sarbarheder i tredjepartssoftware og open source-komponenter.

controls.title: Secure distribution of software updates
controls.description: Software updates from vendors must be received via secure channels and verified before deployment to the production environment.
controls.description_nl: Softwareopdateringer fra leverandoerer skal modtages via sikre kanaler og verificeres foer udrulning i produktionsmiljoeet.

controls.title: Vendor contingency plan
controls.description: The organization must have contingency plans for the scenario where a critical vendor is unavailable, compromised, or ceases operations.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal have beredskabsplaner for scenariet hvor en kritisk leverandoer er utilgaengelig, kompromitteret eller ophorer.

controls.title: Avoidance of vendor lock-in
controls.description: The organization must minimize dependence on individual vendors and ensure that systems and data can be migrated if needed.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal minimere afhaengighed af enkelte leverandoerer og sikre at systemer og data kan migreres ved behov.
